title: Penalty When a Case Involves Five or More Workers. The penalty of
content: 25 cancellation of license may be imposed upon an LMA found liable for committing a less 26 serious or light offense against five (5) or more workers in a single case. This provision 27 shall not apply to consolidated cases unless there are five (5) or more complainants in 28 any of the consolidated cases. 29 30
